title: Fortify Scan
description: Represents a security scan performed by Fortify tools. Scans analyze applications for vulnerabilities using static analysis (SAST), dynamic analysis (DAST), mobile testing, or software composition analysis. Each scan produces vulnerability findings associated with a release.

analysisStatusType.description: Current analysis status of the scan

assessmentTypeId.description: Assessment type used for the scan

startedDateTime.description: Date and time when the scan started

completedDateTime.description: Date and time when the scan completed

totalIssues.description: Total number of vulnerability issues found

issueCountCritical.description: Number of critical severity issues found

issueCountHigh.description: Number of high severity issues found

issueCountMedium.description: Number of medium severity issues found

issueCountLow.description: Number of low severity issues found

isRemediationScan.description: Whether this scan is a remediation verification scan

isBundledAssessment.description: Whether this scan used a bundled assessment

passFailStatus.description: Whether the scan passes the configured security policy

passFailReasonType.description: Reason for the pass or fail determination

languageLevel.description: Language level used for analysis (for static scans)
